summary: The feature m0-capture-git-truth successfully captured explicit git truth. The branch name (dgdh/trio-only-harness-snapshot-20260328) and git status (5 modified .factory/ skill files) are accurately documented. Residue was classified appropriately: baseline.* files as KEEP (active founder documentation), .tmp/ as PARK (mission continuity), .paperclip/worktrees/ as PARK (runtime history), and audit-output/ correctly noted as empty. Minor discrepancies in directory counts were found (.tmp/ handoff claims 112, actual 103; .paperclip/worktrees/ claims 130, actual 114) but these are non-blocking and don't affect classification decisions.

assertions.notes: Current branch explicitly captured. Handoff states 'dgdh/trio-only-harness-snapshot-20260328' and verification confirms: git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD returns exactly this branch name. Git status shows 5 modified files which are correctly listed.

Residue classification is truthful and complete. All residue categories were examined: baseline.md and baseline.json classified as KEEP (active founder documentation), .tmp/ directories classified as PARK (mission continuity), .paperclip/worktrees/ classified as PARK (runtime history), audit-output/ is empty (no action). Classification decisions are justified per item.

Git state is explicitly captured before proceeding. Handoff documents the branch, the 5 modified files (.factory/init.sh, .factory/library/user-testing.md, .factory/services.yaml, .factory/skills/eidan/SKILL.md, .factory/skills/nerah/SKILL.md, .factory/skills/taren/SKILL.md), and all residue classifications. This satisfies the precondition for M1.

issues.description: Minor count discrepancy in .tmp/ directory: handoff claims 112 revenue-image-pipeline directories but actual count is 103. Also .paperclip/worktrees/ claims 130 but actual count is 114. These discrepancies don't affect the PARK classification decisions but accurate counts should be recorded.

sharedStateObservations.description: The nerah skill procedure was followed correctly. Worker read context files, executed bounded work, verified state with git commands, and reported findings explicitly. The handoff format matches the skill's example handoff structure.
sharedStateObservations.source: Worker handoff JSON follows SKILL.md example format
